scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run validate:metadata
scripts.typecheck: cd nextjs-screenshot-tool && bun run typecheck && cd ../cloudflare-worker-screenshot-proxy && bun run typecheck && cd ../vercel-og-image-automation && bun run typecheck && cd ../github-actions-visual-snapshot && bun run typecheck && cd ../node-batch-screenshot-worker && bun run typecheck
scripts.build: cd nextjs-screenshot-tool && bun run build && cd ../cloudflare-worker-screenshot-proxy && bun run build && cd ../vercel-og-image-automation && bun run build && cd ../github-actions-visual-snapshot && bun run build && cd ../node-batch-screenshot-worker && bun run build
scripts.smoke: cd nextjs-screenshot-tool && bun run smoke && cd ../cloudflare-worker-screenshot-proxy && bun run smoke && cd ../vercel-og-image-automation && bun run smoke && cd ../github-actions-visual-snapshot && bun run smoke && cd ../node-batch-screenshot-worker && bun run smoke && cd ../python-scheduled-screenshot-archiver && python3 -m py_compile archive.py && python3 archive.py --dry-run --targets targets.example.json --out sample-output
